final:
// // This module selects between two 64-bit inputs, a and b, based on the CONTROL_ALUSRC signal. When CONTROL_ALUSRC is 1, the output will be equal to input a; when CONTROL_ALUSRC is 0, the output will reflect input b.
module top_module(
  input [63:0] a,
  input [63:0] b,
  input CONTROL_ALUSRC,
  output reg [63:0] out
);always @(a, b, CONTROL_ALUSRC, out) begin
    if (CONTROL_ALUSRC === 0) begin
      out <= a;
    end

    else begin
      out <= b;
    end
  end
endmodule
